title: allium calabrum
intro: Allium calabrum, also known as the Calabrian garlic, is a species of wild garlic native to Italy. It possesses medicinal properties, including antibacterial and antifungal properties, which contribute to its ability to combat infections and promote overall health. The health benefits associated with consuming Allium calabrum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Allium calabrum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as infusions, teas, or oils, which can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
